assertions.description: The Gerbers directory contains 20 gerber files covering F.Cu, B.Cu, F.Mask, B.Mask, F.Paste, B.Paste, F.SilkS, B.SilkS, and Edge.Cuts — all required layers are present. PTH drill file exists with 319 holes total. Layer completeness is correctly reported as True.

INCORRECT: The analyzer reports aligned=False with 'Width varies by 12.7mm across copper/edge layers' and 'Height varies by 12.7mm'. The 12.7mm (0.5 inch) difference is consistent with the THT pin-header connectors not extending to the very edge of the board outline — the copper pads sit 6.35mm inside each board edge as typical for PCB pin-header breakout designs with mounting clearance. All copper layers share the same bounding box (86.36x93.98mm) and the board outline is 99.06x106.68mm. This is a bounding-box extent mismatch, not a coordinate misalignment, and does not indicate a fabrication issue.
